issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnKO' not 'OnAttacked'. The effect activates when a Character would be removed/KO'd, not when attacked.
Condition incomplete. Must check: (1) Character is Sky Island type, (2) has 6000+ base power, (3) would be removed BY OPPONENT. Current condition only checks for Sky Island on board.
Action should be 'DrawCard' not 'FlipLife'. The effect adds cards from Life to hand (draw effect), not flips life.
